plainEnglishRule: Greek Esther and Greek Daniel may not be promoted or repaired by overlay. Each translation must be compared against its own source witness. A source-missing translation lane is an allowed absence; synthetic text is forbidden.

danielGK.currentShape: explicit translation-object active text with NRSV base rows plus KJV/NABRE/DRB addition lanes

DRB.note: Douay-Rheims raw Esther includes Catholic Esther form and must be mapped before any active text comparison or import.

NABRE.note: Historical NABRE Esther source is present. It must be compared in its own source form rather than forced into the active NRSV addition grid.

KJV.note: Historical KJV source uses the ordinary Esther file path, not an Additions_to_Esther underscore path.

localRepoSearchEvidence: Repository search for NRSV/NRSVA plus estherGK/danielGK/BibleGateway returned governance files only, not a source witness.
Repository search for New Revised Standard Version plus Esther (with Additions) returned only data/bible/OT/estherGK.json, the active file itself.

externalCandidateSources.note: Candidate must be opened, acquired, and compared before active Greek Esther NRSV trust. It is not yet a bound source witness.

NRSV.note: Active Greek Esther claims NRSV text, but no independent local NRSV source witness has been found or bound. External source acquisition or a pre-existing licensed source witness is required before active NRSV trust.

DRB.note: Douay-Rheims raw Daniel includes Catholic/extended Daniel material. Active Greek Daniel DRB additions now preserve DRB source addresses: Daniel 3:24-90, Daniel 13:1-65, and Daniel 14:1-42. Daniel 13:65 is DRB-only.

NABRE.note: Historical NABRE Daniel source is present. Active Greek Daniel NABRE addition lanes are exact-source-collated for Prayer/Song, Susanna, and Bel and the Dragon. The separate current Daniel 11 snapshot is not itself a Greek Daniel source witness.

KJV.note: Historical KJV Daniel material is split across ordinary Daniel plus separate apocryphal addition files. Active Greek Daniel KJV addition lanes are exact-source-collated for Prayer of Azariah, Susanna, and Bel and the Dragon.

localRepoSearchEvidence: Repository search for NRSV/NRSVA plus estherGK/danielGK/BibleGateway returned governance files only, not a source witness.
Repository search for New Revised Standard Version plus Daniel (Extended/Catholic Canon) returned only data/bible/OT/danielGK.json, the active file itself.

internalComparisonBaseline.basis: Canonical OT non-Psalms is trusted with no governed exclusions; ordinary Daniel can be compared internally against the trusted canonical Daniel NRSV lane, but this does not replace the need for an external/source witness if final NRSV source trust is required.

externalCandidateSources.sourceName: Oremus NRSV Anglicized Prayer of Azariah
externalCandidateSources.observedPlacement: Prayer of Azariah and Song of the Three Jews, inserted between Daniel 3:23 and 3:24
Chapter 13 of the Greek version of Daniel

externalCandidateSources.sourceName: Oremus NRSV Anglicized Bel and the Dragon
externalCandidateSources.observedPlacement: Chapter 14 of the Greek version of Daniel

NRSV.note: Active Greek Daniel ordinary chapters 1-12 are internally baseline-verified against canonical Daniel NRSV. Active NRSV addition text remains blocked pending approved source witness acquisition. Oremus NRSV Anglicized candidates exist for the three additions but are not bound source witnesses and are not extracted.

nextRequiredWork: Acquire or bind the NRSV/NRSVA source witness for active Greek Esther.
Acquire or approve NRSV source witnesses for Greek Daniel additions before NRSV addition trust.
Extract and normalize the Oremus NRSV Anglicized Daniel-addition candidates only if that source family is approved for active NRSV comparison.
Run exact text collation for active NRSV Greek Esther and active NRSV Greek Daniel additions only after source binding.
